description: Dataset coverage contract for DirectorBundle artifacts built from monthly Salesforce source bundles. A dataset is either source-backed today or explicitly optional-empty until a source requirement is added.

datasets.rationale: APAC pilot is now backed by a dedicated monthly Opportunity list view with unweighted ARR and Probability. Other territories must add equivalent source IDs before full-run promotion.

Legacy SOQL-backed closed-deal dataset. Add a monthly source requirement before using it for publish claims. DECK-CONSUMED via 'Won Lost FY26' but bundle source extraction not yet wired (Track E/M2 follow-up). Migrate to source_backed with source_contract_keys when the source extractor lands.

Renewal detail is not part of the current report-first source contract. DECK-CONSUMED via 'Renewals FY26' but bundle source extraction not yet wired (Track E/M2 follow-up). Migrate to source_backed with source_contract_keys when the source extractor lands.

Approval detail is not part of the current report-first source contract. DECK-CONSUMED via 'Commercial Approval' but bundle source extraction not yet wired (Track E/M2 follow-up). Migrate to source_backed with source_contract_keys when the source extractor lands.
Current-quarter Pipeline Inspection list view is the canonical monthly pipeline display source.
Forward-quarter Pipeline Inspection list view supports fallback when current-quarter active pipeline is empty.

Activity signals remain a legacy SOQL enrichment until a source-backed requirement lands. DECK-CONSUMED via 'Activity Volume' but bundle source extraction not yet wired (Track E/M2 follow-up). Migrate to source_backed with source_contract_keys when the source extractor lands.

Commit items are not part of the current monthly report-first source contract. DECK-CONSUMED via 'Commit Items' but bundle source extraction not yet wired (Track E/M2 follow-up). Migrate to source_backed with source_contract_keys when the source extractor lands.

Field-history stage events are not source-backed by the current specified reports. DECK-CONSUMED via 'Stage History' but bundle source extraction not yet wired (Track E/M2 follow-up). Migrate to source_backed with source_contract_keys when the source extractor lands.

Field-history forecast-category events are not source-backed by the current specified reports. DECK-CONSUMED via 'Forecast Category History' but bundle source extraction not yet wired (Track E/M2 follow-up). Migrate to source_backed with source_contract_keys when the source extractor lands.
Field-history close-date events are not source-backed by the current specified reports.
Prior-quarter movement logic should be rebuilt from historical-trending/field-history requirements before use.
Current-quarter movement logic should be rebuilt from historical-trending/field-history requirements before use.
Historical Trending reports are the canonical source for snapshot movement inputs.
